first_login_session_expired: Session expired. Please try signing in again.
first_login_success: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.

forgot_email_email: Please enter a valid email address.
forgot_center_exists: The selected center does not exist.
forgot_email_send_failed: Failed to send email. Please try again later.
forgot_email_sent: A password reset link has been sent to the email you entered.
reset_token_required: Reset token is missing. Please check the link in your email.

user_lock_helper_only: Only helper accounts can be locked here.
admin_unlock_forbidden: You can only unlock members of your center.
admin_delete_forbidden: You can only remove members of your center.

admin_delete_has_other_center_schedules: This helper has schedule(s) in other center(s) and cannot be removed.

matching_end_required: Please enter end date and time.
matching_end_after_start: End time must be after start time.

matching_helper_not_in_center: The selected helper is not in this center.
matching_client_not_in_center: The selected client is not in this center.
matching_conflict_global: This time overlaps with the helper's schedule (including other centers). Cannot save.
early_stop_reason_required: Early stop reason is required when ending early.
voucher_insufficient_balance: Client voucher balance is insufficient for the estimated amount.
matching_delete_only_future: Only future schedules that have not started can be deleted.
matching_time_edit_forbidden: Time cannot be edited for matchings that have already started or ended.
